evals.prompt: Estou criando uma API REST simples para um blog pessoal. Vai ter posts, categorias e comentários. Só eu vou usar, sem integrações externas além do banco PostgreSQL. Qual arquitetura devo usar e como organizar as pastas?
evals.expected_output: Should recommend Simple Modular. Should NOT recommend Clean Architecture or full Vertical Slice — that would be over-engineering for a personal blog API with 3 entities.

assertions.name: recommends-simple-pattern
assertions.description: Recommends simple modular or basic module-based structure, not Clean Architecture or full VSA

assertions.name: warns-against-over-engineering
assertions.description: Explicitly mentions that more complex architectures would be over-engineering for this case

assertions.name: provides-folder-structure
assertions.description: Shows a concrete folder structure example adapted to the blog context

evals.prompt: Tenho um SaaS de gestão de pedidos com ~15 features: cadastro de clientes, produtos, pedidos, faturamento, relatórios, notificações por email, dashboard. O time tem 4 devs. Preciso de uma arquitetura que mantenha as features isoladas mas sem criar complexidade demais. A stack é Node.js com Fastify.
evals.expected_output: Should recommend Vertical Slice Architecture. Should explain why VSA fits (medium scale, feature isolation, moderate complexity). Should show folder structure adapted to the order management domain.

assertions.name: recommends-vertical-slice
assertions.description: Recommends Vertical Slice Architecture as the primary pattern

assertions.name: explains-why-vsa-fits
assertions.description: Explains why VSA is appropriate for this specific context (feature count, team size, domain complexity)

assertions.name: addresses-cross-feature
assertions.description: Addresses how features like pedidos and faturamento should communicate (contracts, not direct coupling)

assertions.name: domain-specific-structure
assertions.description: Shows folder structure with actual feature names from the user's domain (pedidos, clientes, etc.)

evals.prompt: Estou construindo uma plataforma de e-commerce que integra com 3 gateways de pagamento (Stripe, MercadoPago, PagSeguro) com fallback entre eles, usa AI para gerar descrições de produtos (pode ser OpenAI ou Claude), envia emails via SendGrid, e tem upload de imagens para S3. O time tem 6 devs e o projeto vai crescer bastante. Como devo estruturar isso?
evals.expected_output: Should recommend Combined Strategy (VSA + Clean principles) or full Clean Architecture. Must address provider isolation for payments, AI, email, and storage. Must explain how to handle multi-provider fallback without leaking into business logic.

assertions.name: recommends-combined-or-clean
assertions.description: Recommends Combined Strategy or Clean Architecture — not Simple Modular or plain VSA

assertions.name: addresses-provider-isolation
assertions.description: Explains how to isolate payment, AI, email, and storage providers behind contracts/ports

assertions.name: addresses-multi-provider-fallback
assertions.description: Shows how to handle multiple payment gateways with fallback without polluting business slices

assertions.name: technical-module-pattern
assertions.description: Shows or references the technical module pattern for managing provider complexity
